message:
🌱 Add opentelemetry: Add SIG names to Youtube uploads and organize them into mission (#1505)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentelemetry-715-add-sig-names-to-youtube-uploads-and-organize-them-into-playli",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentelemetry: Add SIG names to Youtube uploads and organize them into playlists again",
+    "description": "Add SIG names to Youtube uploads and organize them into playlists again. Requested by 7+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opentelemetry deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opentelemetry version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry\nhelm list -n opentelemetry 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opentelemetry installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentelemetry configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentelemetry configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry\nkubectl get configmap -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentelemetry\n```\nIt seems that the videos used to have SIG name in them and they used to be filed under a SIG-specific playlist, but it stopped around October 2020. Could we bring this back? It's difficult to find relevant videos the way it is right now."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add SIG names to Youtube uploads and organize them into…",
+        "description": "New meeting workflow is to no longer upload meetings to YouTube, but instead to make Zoom cloud recordings available via Google spreadsheet using Zapier integration:\n\nHere's an example recording: https://zoom.us/rec/share/6VEDYb5zV-hDAT-mDr5W_A9FDYrE6WyTeWMRWz8xqKgJKOypdEwr9rDDerW2xMDj.zz6qA84Yxqces8s4\n\nNote that this includes Zoom chat messages which YouTube videos were previously missing.\n\nThe naming relies on splitting out separate Zoom ID per meeting series, which is documented in #1415.\n\nI\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentelemetry -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentelemetry\nkubectl get events -n opentelemetry --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add SIG names to Youtube uploads and organize them into…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "New meeting workflow is to no longer upload meetings to YouTube, but instead to make Zoom cloud recordings available via Google spreadsheet using Zapier integration:\n\nHere's an example recording: https://zoom.us/rec/share/6VEDYb5zV-hDAT-mDr5W_A9FDYrE6WyTeWMRWz8xqKgJKOypdEwr9rDDerW2xMDj.zz6qA84Yxqces8s4\n\nNote that this includes Zoom chat messages which YouTube videos were previously missing.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentelemetry",
+      "incubating",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    ],

+      "feature"
+    ],

+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+      "kubectl"
+    ],

+  },
